description: Stable Diffusion 1.5 — general-purpose text-to-image, ~4 GB RAM
_comment: SD 1.5 fine-tuned for 595k steps at 512x512 on LAION-aesthetics v2 5+. Text encoder: CLIP ViT-L/14.
_comment_size: Native resolution is 512x512. Larger sizes work but may produce distortions.
_comment_steps: Model card evaluations use 50 PLMS steps. 20–50 is the practical range; 30 is a solid default.
_comment_cfg: CFG 7–8 is the sweet spot per official evaluations. Above 10 causes oversaturation.
